title: Candidate Resource Hub
text:
###### FOR JOB CANDIDATES 
 

# Candidate  
Resource Hub

Have you been asked to take a Criteria assessment or participate in a Criteria video interview? Find all the resources you need to prepare so that you can show off your full potential to employers.

woman on computer taking Criteria assessment

## 
Get ready to wow your future employers

**CCAT Prep**

**LEARN MORE**

### Your Experience Matters 

We know that the hiring process can sometimes feel intimidating, frustrating, or downright scary. That’s why we build all our assessments and interviews with you - the candidate - in mind. Assessments are kept as short and sweet as possible, and above all else they are rigorously tested for fairness to ensure that your full potential shines through.

 Criteria Cognify game and score report

 Criteria platform with scores and video interview

### About Criteria 

Criteria is a software company that helps organizations find and hire great candidates like you. Our scientifically designed assessments and video interviews help both organizations and candidates find long-lasting success and fulfillment at work.

## 
Still have questions?

For additional support, chat with us using the chat bot in the bottom right corner of this page.
